overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V/FiveM showing a female character running along a multi-lane highway surrounded by dense green forest. The character crosses between traffic lanes as vehicles pass by under a partly cloudy afternoon sky, with visible motion blur indicating high movement speed.

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the right shoulder of the highway, maintaining pace with the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: red sedan traveling in the left lane, moving same direction as ego at moderate speed

entered.detail: worn asphalt road surface with visible patches and faded lane markings
dense deciduous trees forming a continuous green wall along the highway
dense deciduous trees lining the right side of the highway
red passenger car visible in the left lane, moving parallel to ego

segments.scene_description: The character runs along the right shoulder of a multi-lane highway surrounded by dense forest on both sides. A red sedan is visible traveling in the left lane, maintaining position relative to the character. The sky is partly cloudy with sunlight casting tree shadows across the worn asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway center lanes during crossing maneuver

events.description: character begins lateral movement from right shoulder toward the left lanes of the highway
dark van passes closely by on the left side as character crosses the lane

agents.ego_description: moving diagonally across the highway lanes from right to left, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: dark van approaching rapidly in the left lane, passing very close to the crossing character
red sedan continuing along the left lane, maintaining speed

entered.detail: dark colored van moving at high speed, approaching from behind in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The character initiates a crossing maneuver from the right shoulder toward the left side of the highway. A dark van approaches rapidly in the left lane and passes very close by, creating a near-miss traffic interaction. The red sedan remains visible in the left lane while the right-side forest exits the frame as the character turns leftward.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway left shoulder near tree line

events.description: character completes crossing and resumes forward running along the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: running forward along the left side of the highway having successfully crossed from the right shoulder

notable_agents.action: silver sedan visible ahead in the distance, traveling in the same direction

entered.detail: silver car visible ahead on the road, approaching from the distance

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the highway, the character continues running along the left shoulder close to the tree line. The dark van has passed ahead and faded into the distance, while the red sedan falls behind. A silver sedan becomes visible approaching in the distance ahead as the character maintains a steady running pace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character runs along a forested highway, transitioning from the right shoulder across active traffic lanes to the opposite side of the road. It begins with the character sprinting along the right shoulder under a partly cloudy sky, with a red sedan maintaining a steady position in the left lane. As the character initiates a crossing maneuver toward the left, a dark van rapidly approaches and passes in a near-miss interaction, causing the right-side forest to exit the frame. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the left shoulder, leaving the red sedan behind while the dark van fades into the distance. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace along the tree line as a silver sedan becomes visible approaching from the distance ahead.
